calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-11-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for hearing on Name Change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. There being no appearance by the petitioner, the Court ordered the matter off calendar,
